acceptance_targets: [chapter_03_f001] Reading the revised labor-yard sequence from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:17 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:113, a reviewer can identify a different narrative consequence in each hiring encounter; no two consecutive contractor beats may end at the same outcome of 'Delroy is rejected and nothing else changes.'

findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised labor-yard sequence from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:17 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:113, a reviewer can identify a different narrative consequence in each hiring encounter; no two consecutive contractor beats may end at the same outcome of 'Delroy is rejected and nothing else changes.'
findings.problem: The labor-yard opener overproves Delroy's exclusion through four closely related hire-and-reject beats. Each refusal adds local color, but the scene keeps returning to the same story position: Delroy pitches, gets read as old or mismatched, absorbs the sting, and the chapter waits again. That repetition softens the escalation before Claude enters and costs scene pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the opening around fewer, more consequential refusal beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:17, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:31, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:53, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:79. Keep the racial and linguistic sorting, but either cut or merge at least one contractor pass so each remaining encounter changes Delroy's leverage in a distinct way: one establishes the yard's sorting rules, one exposes the shoulder publicly, and one turns the morning toward Claude's hold before the Claude mention at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:95.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into embarrassment, erotic consequence, moral compromise, and the ugly arithmetic of poverty. When a scene turns on prejudice, bureaucracy, violence, or family betrayal, stay with the room long enough for the reader to feel what each choice costs. Resolve edge cases by choosing the more specific and less flattering truth unless it breaks established character logic.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, racism, injury, debt, hunger, or shame is rendered abstractly, rewrite until the bodily detail, social pressure, and changed leverage are visible on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high — contractions are the spoken norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, ceremony, legal language, or character-specific pressure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and chapter motor across the book: pair public humiliation with private aftermath, follow argument chapters with information-turn or weather chapters, preserve at least three genuinely quiet domestic or communal stretches, and never let more than three chapters in a row hinge on debate followed by decisive action.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary and concrete, with Caribbean-American texture carried naturally in syntax and reference rather than in italicized glossary behavior; lyrical when earned, blunt when the room turns brutal.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person that rotates by chapter; intimate enough for bodily shame and private contradiction, but alert to class performance, racial reading, and room dynamics.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate lean pressure sentences with occasional longer image-bearing sentences; lyric lift should arrive at emotional turns, never as constant prestige haze.
